CustomField.formula: IF( AND(RecordType.Name ='Unit', Parent_Block__r.RecordType.Name ='SubBlock'), CASESAFEID(Parent_Block__r.Parent_Block__r.Parent_Block__r.Id), IF( RecordType.Name ='Unit', CASESAFEID(Parent_Block__r.Parent_Block__r.Id), IF( RecordType.Name ='SubBlock', CASESAFEID(Parent_Block__r.Parent_Block__r.Id), IF( RecordType.Name ='Block', CASESAFEID(Parent_Block__r.Id), IF( RecordType.Name ='Site', CASESAFEID(Id), NULL)))))
CustomField.label: Site Record Id
